payload.title: Job failed
payload.detail: job=acmeshop_nightly_etl failed_task=unknown source=webhook

payload.title: Read alert snapshot (Gemma 4 vision)
payload.detail: The attached snapshot shows the acmeshop_nightly_etl DAG with ingest green, transform RED (FAILED, OOMKilled), and load skipped. The memory panel is pegged at a 2048MB worker_memory_limit - a strong signal of a memory cap, not a data problem.

payload.title: Triage plan
payload.detail: A scheduled run of acmeshop_nightly_etl failed at the transform task. I'll engage the telemetry, change, and knowledge specialists, then synthesize.

payload.title: get_job_runs
payload.detail: {"job_id": "acmeshop_nightly_etl", "limit": 5}

payload.title: Telemetry finding
payload.detail: transform was OOMKilled: worker memory pegged at the 2048MB limit, while the last 3 nightly runs succeeded with a ~6.9GB peak. The memory ceiling, not the data, is the problem.

payload.detail: {"limit": 5}

result.summary: Reduce worker memory to cut cloud spend

payload.title: Change finding
payload.detail: Config change chg_8f2a1c by costopt-bot ~1h ago cut transform worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 2048 - immediately before the failure.

payload.title: query_runbook
payload.detail: {"query": "transform task OOMKilled memory limit exceeded"}

args.query: transform task OOMKilled memory limit exceeded

payload.title: query_runbook -> result
payload.detail: {"results": [{"id": "rb_oom_transform", "score": 0.41111323700280433, "text": "Runbook: ETL transform task OOMKilled. Symptom: transform stage fails with 'OOMKilled' or 'memory limit exceeded'. Common cause: a recent config change lowered worker_memory_mb below the working-set size (~7GB for nightly volumes). Resolution: revert the offending config change to...(truncated)

results.text: Runbook: ETL transform task OOMKilled. Symptom: transform stage fails with 'OOMKilled' or 'memory limit exceeded'. Common cause: a recent config change lowered worker_memory_mb below the working-set size (~7GB for nightly volumes). Resolution: revert the offending config change to restore worker_memory_mb to 8192, or override worker_memory_mb for the run, then rerun the job. Do NOT simply rerun without restoring memory; the failure is deterministic, not transient.

Runbook: load stage warehouse write failures. Symptom: 'load' task errors writing to warehouse.checkout_facts. Resolution: check warehouse credentials and disk. (Distractor; unrelated to transform memory.)

payload.title: find_similar_failures
payload.detail: {"query": "nightly etl transform OOM after config change"}

args.query: nightly etl transform OOM after config change

payload.title: find_similar_failures -> result
payload.detail: {"results": [{"id": "inc_1042", "score": 0.39056673645973206, "text": "Past incident INC-1042 (resolved): acmeshop_nightly_etl transform OOMKilled after a cost-optimization change reduced worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 4096. Resolution: reverted the config change and reran; pipeline went green. Time to resolve: 26 minutes. Owner: maria. Lesson: route memory-a...(truncated)

results.text: Past incident INC-1042 (resolved): acmeshop_nightly_etl transform OOMKilled after a cost-optimization change reduced worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 4096. Resolution: reverted the config change and reran; pipeline went green. Time to resolve: 26 minutes. Owner: maria. Lesson: route memory-affecting config changes through SRE review.

payload.title: Knowledge finding
payload.detail: The OOM runbook and past incident INC-1042 agree: revert the memory-cutting config change (or raise the limit) and rerun. The failure is deterministic, so a plain rerun would just fail again.

payload.title: Root cause identified
payload.detail: Config change chg_8f2a1c reduced transform worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 2048, causing the transform task to be OOMKilled.

data.root_cause: Config change chg_8f2a1c reduced transform worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 2048, causing the transform task to be OOMKilled.

hypotheses.claim: Lowered worker memory (8192->2048MB) caused transform OOMKill.

evidence.detail: transform OOMKilled: memory limit 2048MB exceeded
Memory pegged at 2048MB limit vs ~6.9GB healthy peak
worker_memory_mb 8192->2048 by costopt-bot 1h before failure
Identical past OOM resolved by reverting the memory change
Failure is deterministic, not transient; plain rerun fails again

proposed_actions.rationale: Restore worker_memory_mb to 8192 by reverting the offending change.
Rerun the nightly ETL to verify recovery after the fix.

payload.title: revert_config
payload.detail: Restore worker_memory_mb to 8192 by reverting the offending change.

data.rationale: Restore worker_memory_mb to 8192 by reverting the offending change.

payload.title: rerun_job
payload.detail: Rerun the nightly ETL to verify recovery after the fix.

data.rationale: Rerun the nightly ETL to verify recovery after the fix.

payload.title: Awaiting human approval
payload.detail: High-risk remediation proposed. Approve to let CereMind apply the fix and rerun the job.

payload.detail: {"results": [{"id": "rb_oom_transform", "score": 0.41111323700280433, "text": "Runbook: ETL transform task OOMKilled. Symptom: transform stage fails with 'OOMKilled' or 'memory limit exceeded'. Common cause: a recent config change lowered worker_memory_mb below the working-set size (~7GB for nightly volumes). Resolution: revert the offending config change to...(truncated)

results.text: Runbook: ETL transform task OOMKilled. Symptom: transform stage fails with 'OOMKilled' or 'memory limit exceeded'. Common cause: a recent config change lowered worker_memory_mb below the working-set size (~7GB for nightly volumes). Resolution: revert the offending config change to restore worker_memory_mb to 8192, or override worker_memory_mb for the run, then rerun the job. Do NOT simply rerun without restoring memory; the failure is deterministic, not transient.

Runbook: load stage warehouse write failures. Symptom: 'load' task errors writing to warehouse.checkout_facts. Resolution: check warehouse credentials and disk. (Distractor; unrelated to transform memory.)

results.text: Past incident INC-1042 (resolved): acmeshop_nightly_etl transform OOMKilled after a cost-optimization change reduced worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 4096. Resolution: reverted the config change and reran; pipeline went green. Time to resolve: 26 minutes. Owner: maria. Lesson: route memory-affecting config changes through SRE review.

payload.title: Knowledge finding
payload.detail: The OOM runbook and past incident INC-1042 agree: revert the memory-cutting config change (or raise the limit) and rerun. The failure is deterministic, so a plain rerun would just fail again.

payload.title: Root cause identified
payload.detail: Config change chg_8f2a1c reduced transform worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 2048, causing the transform task to be OOMKilled.

data.root_cause: Config change chg_8f2a1c reduced transform worker_memory_mb from 8192 to 2048, causing the transform task to be OOMKilled.

hypotheses.claim: Lowered worker memory (8192->2048MB) caused transform OOMKill.

evidence.detail: transform OOMKilled: memory limit 2048MB exceeded
Memory pegged at 2048MB limit vs ~6.9GB healthy peak
worker_memory_mb 8192->2048 by costopt-bot 1h before failure
Identical past OOM resolved by reverting the memory change
Failure is deterministic, not transient; plain rerun fails again
